name: Taff Trail: Cardiff Bay to Castell Coch
dog_lead_policy: On lead in town; off-lead in forest
highlights: Flat-ish trail from waterfront to fairytale castle.
points_of_interest: Cardiff Castle; Llandaff Cathedral; Castell Coch (Cadw)
viewpoints: River Taff; Castell Coch through trees
parking_start: Cardiff Bay; train back from Taffs Well
food_drink_nearby: Cathedral Road cafes; Lewis Arms Tongwynlais; Castell Coch tea room
public_transport: NCN cycle route; train at Taffs Well
